dungeons.name: Algeth'ar Academy
dungeons.lore: Long ago, the great Algeth'ar Academy was a place of higher learning for all dragons. Though it fell dormant with the rest of the Isles, it has reopened and is back under the guidance of Headteacher Doragosa. In a series of exciting, new changes the Academy is currently seeking new students from all walks of life, not just dragons, as well as volunteers to help get it back to the bustling halls of education it once was. Those who walk the Academy grounds are sure to learn something new.

bosses.name: Overgrown Ancient
bosses.lore: Professors Mystakria and Ichistrasz have used just a touch too much magic in an effort to clear the botany labs. Now they have a big, leafy problem on their hands in the form of an Overgrown Ancient that threatens to undo all their hard work.

Tanks: Being hit by [Barkbreaker] greatly increases Physical damage taken for a short time after.
Once awakened by [Burst Forth], Hungry Lashers can inflict significant damage if left unchecked.
Ancient Branches cast [Healing Touch], which can be interrupted.
Damage Dealers: Hungry Lashers can be damaged and killed even before the Ancient awakens them with [Burst Forth].
Ancient Branches cast [Healing Touch], which can be interrupted.
Healers: The target of [Barkbreaker] takes greatly increased Physical damage for a short time after being hit.
[Burst Forth] inflicts significant damage to all party members.

abilities.name: Germinate
abilities.text: The Overgrown Ancient forces dormant lasher seeds beneath all players' feet to sprout every 1 sec for 4 sec. Each emerging seed inflicts 25 Physical damage to players within $a1 yds and knocks them back, then leaves behind a dormant Hungry Lasher.

children.name: Lasher Toxin
children.text: The Hungry Lasher's attacks have a chance to poison the target, inflicting 1 Nature damage every 3 sec for 9 sec. This effect stacks.

abilities.name: Burst Forth
abilities.text: Upon reaching 100 energy, the Overgrown Ancient releases its abundant life magic to awaken all dormant Lashers, inflicting 16 Nature damage to all players as they burst free from the ground.

abilities.name: Branch Out
abilities.text: The Overgrown Ancient throws one of its own branches at a location, inflicting 30 Physical damage to players within $a1 yds and knocking them back. The Ancient Branch then animates and attacks players.

children.name: Splinterbark
children.text: Splinters erupt from the Ancient as its branch is torn away, causing all players to bleed for 10 every 3 sec for 60 sec. This effect stacks.

children.name: Healing Touch
children.text: Heal an ally for 150.

children.name: Abundance
children.text: Upon death, release a spark of life energy that bursts after 3.5 sec, healing allies and players within $a1 yds for 250, and removing all applications of Splinterbark.

abilities.name: Barkbreaker
abilities.text: The Overgrown Ancient stomps its target with crushing force, inflicting 48 Physical damage and increasing Physical damage taken by 30% for 9 sec.

bosses.name: Crawth
bosses.lore: The Lish Llrath, or Talon Toss, arena is quite literally for the birds these days. Crawth has taken up residence in the center of the arena and has no immediate plans to move out soon. Let's see if we can get her to play ball... and leave.

Tanks: [Savage Peck] inflicts high damage over time.
Scoring goals during [Play Ball!] can activate the field's [Firestorm] or [Gale Force].
[Overpowering Gust] knocks away players in front of Crawth.
Damage Dealers: Scoring goals during [Play Ball!] can activate the field's [Firestorm] or [Gale Force].
[Overpowering Gust] knocks away players in front of Crawth.
[Deafening Screech] interrupts spells and silences targets that are currently casting.
Healers: Scoring goals during [Play Ball!] can activate the field's [Firestorm] or [Gale Force].
[Overpowering Gust] knocks away players in front of Crawth.
[Deafening Screech] interrupts spells and silences targets that are currently casting.

abilities.name: Play Ball!
abilities.text: The goals of The Pitch activate, allowing players to score points in either the Goal of the Searing Blaze or the Goal of the Rushing Winds.

children.name: Goal of the Searing Blaze
children.text: Scoring 3 points in the Goal of the Searing Blaze triggers a Firestorm.

children.name: Firestorm
children.text: The goal erupts in flames, launching several motes of fire at the arena. Each mote inflicts 25 Fire damage and stuns players for $376449D within $376449A1 yards of where it lands. The Firestorm also stuns Crawth and makes her take 75% increased damage for $376781D and afflicts her with Blistering Fire.

children.name: Blistering Fire
children.text: Fire emits searing heat that inflicts 4 Fire damage every 2 sec to all players.

children.name: Goal of the Rushing Winds
children.text: Scoring 3 points in the Goal of the Rushing Winds triggers Gale Force.

children.name: Gale Force
children.text: Fierce winds rush out of the goal, knocking Crawth in the air and pushing players back and summoning Roving Cyclones. Each mote can be picked up to grant 45% Haste and 50% movement speed for 20 sec. This effect also provides immunity to being pushed by Gale Force.

children.name: Roving Cyclone
children.text: Creates cyclones that move around, inflicting 25 Nature damage and knocking back any player it contacts.

abilities.name: Ruinous Winds
abilities.text: At 75% and 45% health, Crawth unleashes a devasting gust of winds every 3 sec, inflicting 20 Nature damage to all players and knocking them back.

abilities.name: Overpowering Gust
abilities.text: Crawth faces a random player and flaps her wings, inflicting 50 Nature damage and knocking back all players in front of her.

abilities.name: Deafening Screech
abilities.text: Crawth releases a loud screech, causing a sonic eruption at all players, inflicting 12 Nature damage. This effect interrupts spell casts and also silences any player interrupted in this manner for 6 sec.

abilities.name: Deafening Screech
abilities.text: Crawth releases a loud screech, causing a sonic eruption at all player locations, inflicting 12 Nature damage and additional 4 Nature damage every 1 sec for 8 sec to all players within $377009A1 yards of each location. This effect interrupts spell casts and also silences any player interrupted in this manner for 6 sec.

abilities.name: Savage Peck
abilities.text: Crawth viciously pecks at her target, inflicting 45 Physical damage instantly with an additional 7 Physical damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

bosses.name: Vexamus
bosses.lore:
As one of the most tenured professors in the academy, Maxdormu uses his powers as a bronze dragon to help bring his history lessons to life. 

While this proves to be quite an educational and fun experience, it can occasionally go awry. Vexamus is one of Professor Maxdormu's favorite lessons, but if any historical detail is inaccurate he will be quick to scold any rowdy students.

Tanks: [Arcane Expulsion] inflicts heavy damage in a frontal cone.
Vexamus gains energy from absorbing [Arcane Orbs].
Damage Dealers: [Mana Bombs] leave behind a pool of [Corrupted Mana] after detonating.
Vexamus gains energy from absorbing [Arcane Orbs].
Healers: [Mana Bombs] leave behind a pool of [Corrupted Mana] after detonating.
Vexamus gains energy from absorbing [Arcane Orbs].

children.name: Arcane Orbs
children.text: The Professor conjures enchanted orbs from the magic book that inflict 30 Arcane damage within 3 yards of impact and begin to gravitate towards Vexamus. If an orb is absorbed by Vexamus, the elemental inflict 12 Arcane damage to all players. If an orb is absorbed by a player, it will inflict 10 Arcane damage to them.

children.name: Oversurge
children.text: Increases damage taken from absorbing Arcane Orbs by 200% for 18 sec.

children.name: Arcane Fissure
children.text: Upon reaching 100 energy, Vexamus explodes with overwhelming power inflicting 16 Arcane damage to all players and pushing them back. Fissures erupt multiple times at player locations, each inflicting 30 Arcane damage within $388546A1 yards.

children.name: Arcane Fissure
children.text: Upon reaching 100 energy, Vexamus explodes with overwhelming power inflicting 16 Arcane damage to all players and pushing them back.

children.name: Mana Bombs
children.text: Vexamus infuses up to 3 players with explosive mana, inflicting 5 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 4 sec. Upon expiration, the mana will detonate inflicting 10 Arcane damage within $386202A1 yards and leaving a pool of Corrupted Mana for 60 sec.

children.name: Corrupted Mana
children.text: Corrupted Mana inflicts 18 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players inside and reduces their movement speed by -30%.

children.name: Arcane Expulsion
children.text: Vexamus ejects a mass of arcane energy inflicting 40 Arcane damage to players in front of it.

bosses.name: Echo of Doragosa
bosses.lore: Headteacher Doragosa thought of everything when it came to Algeth'ar Academy. Including a complex simulacrum of herself to take care of any day to day tasks and upkeep while the Isles lay dormant. Now that the Academy is open once again, perhaps she can use it to help keep track of all the new students. It's done a fine job in the interim, and is absolutely the one spell that did not degrade after all these years. Perfectly stable and helpful. Right?

Tanks: Multiple applications of [Overwhelming Power] will create [Arcane Rifts].
[Astral Blast] inflicts heavy arcane damage and applies an application of [Overwhelming Power].
Healers: Multiple applications of [Overwhelming Power] will create [Arcane Rifts].
Damage Dealers: Multiple applications of [Overwhelming Power] will create [Arcane Rifts].

abilities.name: Overwhelming Power
abilities.text: The Echo of Doragosa's arcane attacks leave wild energy on players they hit, inflicting 3 Arcane damage every 1 sec and increasing their Haste 5%. This effect stacks. At 3 applications, this effect erupts into an Arcane Rift.

children.name: Arcane Rift
children.text: The excess power coalesces into a rift of arcane energy, inflicting 10 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players within. This rift occasionally releases Uncontrolled Energy.

children.name: Uncontrolled Energy
children.text: Wild Magic explodes on contact with a player, inflicting 25 Arcane damage to players within $A1 yds. Applies Overwhelming Power to all targets struck.

abilities.name: Unleash Energy
abilities.text: The Echo of Doragosa unleashes powerful arcane energy, inflicting 10 Arcane damage to all players and opening Arcane Rifts in nearby locations.

children.name: Arcane Rift

children.name: Uncontrolled Energy

abilities.name: Astral Blast
abilities.text: The Echo of Doragosa blasts the target player with powerful arcane energy, inflicting 30 Arcane damage and applying Overwhelming Power.

abilities.name: Power Vacuum
abilities.text: The Echo of Doragosa pulls all players to her location, then strikes with explosive energy inflicting 40 Arcane damage and knocking back all players within $a1 yards. Applies Overwhelming Power to anyone hit.

abilities.name: Power Vacuum

abilities.name: Arcane Missiles
abilities.text: The Echo of Doragosa inflicts 10 Arcane damage to a player. Applies Overwhelming Power to the target.

abilities.name: Arcane Missiles
abilities.text: The Echo of Doragosa inflicts 10 Arcane damage to a player.

abilities.name: Energy Bomb
abilities.text: The Echo of Doragosa marks random players with arcane energy for 6 sec. When the Energy Bomb expires, it inflicts 12 Arcane damage to all players within $A1 yards. Applies Overwhelming Power to the target.

abilities.name: Energy Bomb
abilities.text: The Echo of Doragosa marks a player arcane energy for 6 sec. When the Energy Bomb expires, it inflicts 12 Arcane damage to all players within $374352A1 yards.

dungeons.name: Magisters' Terrace
dungeons.lore: Magisters' Terrace is the heart of arcane study for the sin'dorei, including Magister Umbric, long ago. Within its halls lies the Cynosure of Twilight, the key to unlocking the way into the Voidstorm.

bosses.name: Arcanotron Custos
bosses.lore: This highly advanced arcane construct has been charged with keeping the peace and ensuring that all Magisters adhere to rules and restrictions. Veering from said rules will not be tolerated.

Damage Dealers: [Arcane Expulsion] inflicts a heavy amount of damage and knocks back all players.
[Arcane Residue] inflicts heavy damage to players standing in the area.
Arcanotron Custos gains [Arcane Empowerment] if an Energy Orb reaches it.
Healers: [Ethereal Shackles] roots players and inflicts periodic damage.
[Arcane Residue] inflicts heavy damage to players standing in the area.
Arcanotron Custos gains [Arcane Empowerment] if an Energy Orb reaches it.
Tanks: [Repulsing Slam] inflicts a heavy amount of damage and knocks back its target.
[Arcane Residue] inflicts heavy damage to players standing in the area.

children.name: Energy Orb

abilities.name: Repulsing Slam

bosses.name: Seranel Sunlash
bosses.lore: An accomplished Spellbreaker, Serenel Sunlash has earned the full trust of the Magisters. Charged with the protection of the Cynosure of Twilight, Seranel will fulfill those duties with his very life if necessary.

Damage Dealers: [Wave of Silence] inflicts heavy damage and silences players outside of [Suppression Zones].
[Runic Mark] inflicts moderate damage to nearby players.
[Suppression Zone] and [Feedback] silences and pacifies players.
Healers: [Wave of Silence] inflicts heavy damage and silences players outside of [Suppression Zones].
[Runic Mark] inflicts moderate damage to nearby players.
[Suppression Zone] and [Feedback] silences and pacifies players.
Tanks: [Hastening Ward] increases Seranel's attack speed and causes his melee attacks to inflict additional Arcane damage.
[Wave of Silence] inflicts heavy damage and silences players outside of [Suppression Zones].
[Runic Mark] inflicts moderate damage to nearby players.

abilities.text: Seranel slams his shield into the ground, inflicting 40 Arcane damage to players within $1224903A2 yards and conjuring a Suppression Zone at the impact area. The Suppression Zone silences and pacifies players standing within and purges magical effects.

children.name: Feedback
children.text: The Suppression Zone consumes Runic Mark from the target, causing them to emit a barrage of arcane missiles. Each missile inflicts 30 Arcane damage to players within $A2 yards of the impact area, silencing and pacifying them for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Suppression Zone
abilities.text: Seranel slams his shield into the ground, inflicting 40 Arcane damage to players within $1224903A2 yards and conjuring a Suppression Zone at the impact area. The Suppression Zone silences and pacifies players standing within and purges magical effects.

abilities.name: Wave of Silence
abilities.text: Seranel readies a Wave of Silence, inflicting 15 Arcane damage to all players and pacifying any player outside of the Suppression Zone for 8 sec.

abilities.name: Runic Mark
abilities.text: Seranel hurls an Arcane infused glaive at a target inflicting ${1+5} Arcane damage and an additional 5 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players within $1225796A2 yards. The glaive bounces to 1 nearby players.

abilities.name: Hastening Ward
abilities.text: Seranel surrounds himself in a hastening ward, increasing his attack speed by 100% and his auto attacks to inflict an additional 5 Arcane damage for 15 sec.

bosses.name: Gemellus
bosses.lore: An otherworldly spawn of Void origins, Gemellus seems to utilize the Void not only for its own protection, but to propigate and foster the development of its species as well.

Damage Dealers: [Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
[Cosmic Sting] inflicts moderate damage and creates [Void Secretions] upon expiration.
Healers: [Cosmic Sting] inflicts moderate damage and creates [Void Secretions] upon expiration.
[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
Tanks: [Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
[Cosmic Sting] inflicts moderate damage and creates [Void Secretions] upon expiration.

abilities.name: Neural Link
abilities.text: Gemellus forms a neural link with a player, absorbing damage equal to 20% of its maximum health. The player they are linked to receives 20% more damage for 12 sec. Players who touch the Gemellus who linked with them before Neural Link expires disrupts the connection, removing Gemellus' damage absorb.

children.name: Void Secretions

bosses.lore: A powerful creature of the Void, Degentrius has taken advantage of the opportunity inadvertently provided by Magister Umbric and launched an assault on the Terrace.

Damage Dealers: If there are no players standing under [Unstable Void Essence]  when it impacts, damage will be inflicted to all players.
[Void Torrent]  inflicts moderate damage and stuns any players that come into contact with it.
Healers: [Devouring Entropy] creates Entropy Orbs upon removal.

abilities.name: Void Torrent

abilities.name: Unstable Void Essence
abilities.text: Degentrius launches unstable void energy that bounces to 4 locations, inflicting 10 Shadow damage to any player at the point of impact. If no player is in the area the unstable void essence erupts in Void Destruction.

children.name: Void Destruction
children.text: Void energy erupts upon impact with the ground inflicting 12 Shadow damage to all players plus an additional 1 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec for 40 sec. This effect stacks.

abilities.name: Devouring Entropy
abilities.text: Degentrius corrupts several players with Void energy, inflicting 3 Shadow damage every 1 sec. Each afflicted player receives a different duration. Upon expiration, Entropy Orbs launch from the player's location.

children.name: Entropy Orb
children.text: Volatile masses inflict 15 Shadow damage to players struck and additionaly reduce their movement speed by 70% for 5 sec.

abilities.name: Hulking Fragment
abilities.text: Degentrius smashes a massive fragment into their current target, inflicting 35 Shadow damage to players within $1280119a1 yards. The force of the impact knocks away other players within $1280119a1 yards of their target.

children.name: Umbral Splinters
children.text: Embedded splinters from Hulking Fragment inflict 4 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 30 sec. This effect stacks. Upon removal, the splinters dissolve, leaving behind Stygian Ichor.

children.name: Stygian Ichor
children.text: The dissolved splinters form a pool on the ground for 40 sec, inflicting 2 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec to players within.

abilities.name: Entropy Blast
abilities.text: Degentrius unleashes an Entropy Blast at its primary target inflicting Physical damage.

dungeons.name: Maisara Caverns
dungeons.lore: Beneath the sacred Maisara Hills, Vilebranch trolls sacrifice Witherbark captives to power their necromancy. Their rituals twist stolen souls into fuel for Rak'tul, a monstrous dire troll bound in the depths. If the cavern's magic is left to fester, Zul'Aman will face a terror it cannot contain.

bosses.name: Muro'jin and Nekraxx
bosses.lore: Muro'jin is a relentless tracker, charged with capturing victims for the Vilebranch's dark rites. Nekraxx, a reanimated eagle, strikes down any who resist capture by her master. They must not be allowed to supply souls for Vordaza's necrotic magic any longer.

Damage Dealers: Muro'jin attempts to [Revive Pet] upon Nekraxx's defeat, and Nekraxx enters [Bestial Wrath] upon Muro'jin's defeat.
Muro'jin's [Freezing Traps] encase players in ice upon contact. Players encased in ice can intercept Nekraxx's [Carrion Swoop].
Muro'jin's [Barrage] follows the targeted player and affects all players in a frontal cone.
Healers: Nekraxx's [Infected Pinions] inflicts significant damage to all players.
Muro'jin's [Freezing Traps] encase players in ice upon contact. Players encased in ice can intercept Nekraxx's [Carrion Swoop].
Muro'jin's [Barrage] follows the targeted player and affects all players in a frontal cone.

children.name: Freezing Trap
children.text: Muro'jin throws traps at players which remain for 40 sec. Upon contact, these incapacitate the triggering player for 8 sec. Damage may break the effect.

children.name: Freezing Trap
children.text: Muro'jin throws traps at players which remain for 40 sec. Upon contact, these incapacitate the triggering player for 8 sec. Damage may break the effect.

children.name: Icy Slick
children.text: Triggered Freezing Traps leave behind a frozen patch that inflicts 5 Frost damage every 1 sec to players within and causes them to slide.

children.name: Barrage
children.text: Muro'jin fixes his aim on a player for 5 sec, firing a spray of venomous arrows in a frontal cone toward them every 0.5 sec. The volley inflicts 4 Plague damage to players struck and applies Vilebranch Sting.

children.name: Vilebranch Sting
children.text: Muro'jin's venom-tipped arrows inhibit targets, reducing their movement speed by 5% for 10 sec. This effect stacks.

children.name: Flanking Spear
children.text: Muro'jin harpoons behind his current target and hurls a massive spear. The spear inflicts 60 Physical damage and knocks the target away, applying Open Wound.

children.name: Open Wound

children.name: Revive Pet
children.text: Muro'jin revives Nekraxx, returning them to life with 35% of their health.

children.name: Carrion Swoop
children.text: Nekraxx charges toward a marked player, inflicting 18 Shadow damage to players in her path and knocking them upwards. If Nekraxx strikes a player incapacitated by Freezing Trap, the trap shatters instead, stunning Nekraxx for 5 sec.

children.name: Carrion Swoop
children.text: Nekraxx charges toward a marked player, inflicting 18 Shadow damage to players in her path and knocking them upwards. If Nekraxx strikes a player incapacitated by Freezing Trap, the trap shatters instead, stunning Nekraxx for 5 sec.

children.name: Coordinated Assault
children.text: Muro'jin hurls an axe at players knocked up by Carrion Swoop, inflicting 35 Physical damage and knocking them further upwards.

children.name: Fetid Quillstorm
children.text: Nekraxx soars to a location and releases a surge of dark energy, inflicting 25 Shadow damage to players within $1243900a1 yards and flinging quills which inflict 25 Shadow damage to players within $1256247a1 yards.

children.name: Infected Pinions
children.text: Nekraxx pierces all players with festering feathers, inflicting 2 Plague damage every 1 sec for 30 sec.

children.name: Bestial Wrath
children.text: Muro'jin's defeat sends Nekraxx into a frenzy, increasing her damage done by 20% every 4 sec. This effect stacks.

bosses.name: Vordaza
bosses.lore: Vordaza, the Vilebranch's master of souls, performs forbidden rites to extract the soul essences of the dead. She distills the suffering of her victims into raw necrotic energy to empower Rak'tul, her monstrous creation. Her vile magic and her monster must be stopped.

Damage Dealers: Vordaza summons Unstable Phantoms with [Wrest Phantoms] that chase players with [Final Pursuit].
Unstable Phantoms afflict all players with [Lingering Dread] when defeated.
While [Deathshroud] holds, Vordaza is unable to be interrupted.
Healers: Vordaza summons Unstable Phantoms with [Wrest Phantoms] that chase players with [Final Pursuit].
Unstable Phantoms afflict all players with [Lingering Dread] when defeated.
[Drain Soul] inflicts heavy damage to Vordaza's current target and absorbs healing received.

abilities.name: Necrotic Convergence
abilities.text: Vordaza protects herself with Deathshroud and unleashes waves of necrotic energy which inflict 4 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec for up to 60 sec. This effect grows in intensity over time.

children.name: Deathshroud
children.text: Vordaza wraps herself in a necrotic barrier, becoming immune to interrupt effects and absorbing the next 385 damage for 60 sec.

children.name: Coalesced Death
children.text: Vordaza's ritual forms masses of soul ichor that flow across the dais, inflicting 25 Shadow damage to players struck.

abilities.name: Wrest Phantoms

children.name: Haunting Remains

children.name: Soulrot
children.text: Upon defeat Unstable Phantoms leave behind a pool of necrotic residue for 20 sec, inflicting 10 Shadow damage every 1.5 sec to players within.

children.name: Lingering Dread
children.text: The phantom screams when slain, inflicting 5 Shadow damage to all players.

children.name: Veiled Presence
children.text: $?|diff23[The phantom's incorporeal form reduces their damage taken by -99%.][The phantom's incorporeal form reduces their damage taken by -99%, but causes them to lose 0% health every 1 sec.]

children.name: Veiled Presence
children.text: $?|diff23[The phantom's incorporeal form reduces their damage taken by -99%.][The phantom's incorporeal form reduces their damage taken by -99%, but causes them to lose 0% health every 1 sec.]

abilities.name: Unmake
abilities.text: Vordaza unleashes a frontal surge of soulflaying force for 4.5 sec, inflicting 12 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec to players caught in the blast and pushing them away.

abilities.name: Drain Soul
abilities.text: Vordaza siphons the life essence from her current target, inflicting 10 Shadow damage and absorbing the next 10 healing received every 1 sec for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Withering Miasma
abilities.text: A withering miasma saturates the cavern, inflicting 3 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec.

bosses.name: Rak'tul, Vessel of Souls
bosses.lore: An undead thrall bound to Vordaza, Rak'tul is grotesquely bloated with the essences of tormented souls and necrotic power. Drunk on his newfound power and driven mad by the souls' endless suffering, Rak'tul stands ready to break Zul'Aman beneath the crushing weight of his fists.

Damage Dealers: Totems spawn at each [Crush Souls] target's location and cast [Soulbind] at a player.
[Soulrending Roar] applies [Withering Soul] until players return to the realm of the living.
Interrupting [Eternal Suffering] grants [Spectral Residue].
Healers: Totems spawn at each [Crush Souls] target's location and cast [Soulbind] at a player.
[Soulrending Roar] applies [Withering Soul] until players return to the realm of the living.
[Deathgorged Vessel] inflicts heavy damage to all players.

abilities.name: Crush Souls
abilities.text: Rak'tul repeatedly leaps and slams down, inflicting 20 Shadow damage to players within $1252704a1 yards. Each impact plants a Soulbind Totem.

children.name: Soulbind
children.text: The totem ensnares a player, inflicting 2 Shadow damage every 1 sec and pulling them toward the totem.

children.name: Chill of Death
children.text: The totem inflicts 10 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec to players within $1252813A1 yards.

abilities.name: Spiritbreaker
abilities.text: Rak'tul pummels his target twice, inflicting 35 Physical damage with each strike. He then delivers a final empowered blow, inflicting 28 Shadow damage and launching the target high into the air. The final blow leaves behind a patch of Spectral Decay.

children.name: Spectral Decay
children.text: The pooling essence inflicts 6 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players within and increases their damage taken by 30%.

abilities.name: Deathgorged Vessel
abilities.text: Rak'tul's engorged form releases soul energy every 6 sec, inflicting 11 Shadow damage to all players and ejecting Volatile Essences.

children.name: Volatile Essence
children.text: Released soul energy bursts upon impact, inflicting 20 Shadow damage to players within $a1 yards.

abilities.name: Soulrending Roar
abilities.text: Rak'tul roars with tremendous force, awakening the Restless Masses and applying Withering Soul to all players. This affliction tears players' souls asunder, flinging them across the Echoing Span and severing them from the realm of the living. Soul Expulsion leaves Rak'tul momentarily in a trance.

children.name: Cries of the Fallen
children.text: The soul cries out upon contacting a player, inflicting 5 Shadow damage and rooting them for 3 sec.

children.name: Eternal Suffering
children.text: The soul radiates shadow magic, reducing the movement speed of players within $a1 yards by 60%. Upon interruption, the soul dissipates, empowering all players with Spectral Residue.

children.name: Spectral Residue
children.text: Released essence empowers players, increasing their movement speed by 25% and increasing their damage, healing, and absorption effects by 25% for 40 sec. This effect stacks, but does not refresh its duration.

children.name: Withering Soul
children.text: While in an incorporeal form, the target suffers 0 Shadow damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks every 4 sec. Returning to the realm of the living removes this effect.

children.name: Soul Expulsion
children.text: Soulrending Roar sends Rak'tul into a stupor, stunning him for 45 sec. Souls periodically erupt from his form, inflicting 28 Shadow damage to players within $1279517a1 yards of each impact.

children.name: Shattered Totem
children.text: Rak'tul's roar shatters each remaining Soulbind Totem, inflicting 25 Shadow damage to all players for each totem shattered.

dungeons.name: Nexus-Point Xenas
dungeons.lore: A fractured facility teetering on the edge of collapse. Once a hub of innovation, its core now pulses with unstable void and arcane energy. Brave adventurers must navigate its shifting wings, confront voidwalking guardians, and uncover the truth behind its unraveling power.

bosses.name: Chief Corewright Kasreth
bosses.lore: Chief Corewright Kasreth and the Shadowguard Ethereals once upheld flawless energy flow within the Nexus-Point's Corespark Engine. But Lothraxion's radiant disruption shattered their balance. Now, cloaked in mistrust and weary of outsiders, they labor to restore the arcane harmony that once sustained the Nexus-Point.

Damage Dealers: [Reflux Charge] inflicts damage until overloaded.
[Leyline Arrays] link randomly between conduits around the room and inflict heavy damage when crossing.
[Flux Collapse] launches a continuous flow of arcane towards a player.
Healers: [Reflux Charge] inflicts damage until overloaded.
[Leyline Arrays] link randomly between conduits around the room and inflict heavy damage when crossing.
[Flux Collapse] launches a continuous flow of arcane towards a player.
Tanks: [Reflux Charge] inflicts damage until overloaded.
[Leyline Arrays] link randomly between conduits around the room and inflict heavy damage when crossing.
[Flux Collapse] launches a continuous flow of arcane towards a player.

abilities.name: Leyline Array
abilities.text: A dangerous flow of Arcane power links between conduits inflicting 30 Arcane damage when crossed and reducing their movement speed by -20% for 8 sec. This effect stacks.

abilities.name: Corespark Detonation
abilities.text: Upon reaching 100 energy, Kasreth overcharges a spark in the core engine and launches it at a random location, inflicting 25 Arcane damage to all players within $A1 yards of the impact. The detonation causes a Flux Collapse, leaving behind Arcane Spills, and Sparkburn clings to all players.

children.name: Sparkburn
children.text: An arcane discharge clings to players absorbing the next 40 healing and inflicts 3 Arcane damage every 1 sec.

abilities.name: Corespark Detonation
abilities.text: Upon reaching 100 energy, Kasreth overcharges a spark in the core engine and launches it at a random location, inflicting 25 Arcane damage to all players within $A1 yards of the impact. The detonation causes a Flux Collapse, leaving behind Arcane Spills, and Sparkburn clings to all players.

children.name: Sparkburn
children.text: An arcane discharge clings to players absorbing the next 40 healing and inflicts 3 Arcane damage every 1 sec.

abilities.name: Reflux Charge
abilities.text: Kasreth hurls a refluxing circuit on a random player inflicting 5 Arcane damage every 1 sec. Provides immunity while standing in Leyline Array as the circuit recoils and clears the effect, stunning the player for 1 sec.

abilities.name: Flux Collapse
abilities.text: Broken pipes leak excess power, inflicting 10 Arcane damage to enemies within $a1 yards of the impact. Causes an Arcane Spill to form for 78 sec.

children.name: Arcane Spill
children.text: Residual arcane energy lingers on the ground, inflicting 12 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players standing within.

abilities.name: Arcane Zap
abilities.text: Kasreth zaps the player, inflicting 10 Arcane damage.

bosses.name: Corewarden Nysarra
bosses.lore: Corewarden Nysarra guards Nexus-Point Xenas with waning strength. Lightscarred by Lothraxion's assault, she broods in her wing, wounded and waiting. The Nullward stirs with battle, and her wrath sharpens for any who dare approach.

Damage Dealers: Corewarden Nysarra calls to her subordinates to assist during battle.
[Eclipsing Step] carves into nearby players in addition to the targeted victim.
[Lightscar Flare] stuns as the Fractured Image strikes its target and the resulting wound surges with Holy energy, providing power to those standing within it.
Healers: Corewarden Nysarra calls to her subordinates to assist during battle.
[Eclipsing Step] carves into nearby players in addition to the targeted victim.
[Lightscar Flare] stuns as the Fractured Image strikes its target and the resulting wound surges with Holy energy, providing power to those standing within it.
Tanks: Corewarden Nysarra calls to her subordinates to assist during battle.
The power of [Umbral Lash] cleaves nearby players and applies [Void Gash].
[Lightscar Flare] stuns as the Fractured Image strikes its target and the resulting wound surges with Holy energy, providing power to those standing within it.

abilities.name: Lightscarred
abilities.text: Wounded by Lothraxion, Nysarra begins the encounter at 60% health. Fractured Images periodically tear into the arena, causing Lightscar Flare.

children.name: Lightscar Flare
children.text: A fractured image of Lothraxion strikes at Nysarra, causing her wound to flare and stunning her for 18 sec. Players caught in the image's blast suffer 15 Holy damage and are disoriented for 5 sec. Standing in the wound's flare increases the target's healing done by 30% and damage dealt to Nysarra by 300% but inflicts 7 Holy damage every 1 sec until she recovers.

children.name: Lightscar Flare
children.text: A fractured image of Lothraxion strikes at Nysarra, causing her wound to flare and stunning her for 18 sec. Players caught in the image's blast suffer 15 Holy damage and are disoriented for 5 sec. Standing in the wound's flare increases the target's healing done by 30% and damage dealt to Nysarra by 300% but inflicts 7 Holy damage every 1 sec until she recovers.

children.name: Devour the Unworthy
children.text: Nyssara channels the void to consume any surviving subordinates, restoring her own strength every 0.5 sec for 5 sec and triggers a burst of void energy inflicting 15 Shadow damage to all players.

abilities.name: Null Vanguard
abilities.text: Remnants of Nysarra's shattered command rise to defend and suppress.

children.name: Flailstorm
children.text: The Dreadflail fixates on a random enemy and spins their flails inflicting 3 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec to enemies within $1282676A1 yards of the caster.

children.name: Void Lash
children.text: The Dreadflail empowers its weapons, causing melee attacks to inflict 15 Shadow damage in a cone in front of it for 8.25 sec.

children.name: Nullify
children.text: The Grand Nullifier conjures a blast of void energy at the target, inflicting 40 Shadow damage.

children.name: Dusk Frights
children.text: The Grand Nullifier calls several frights to a void zone, fearing players within $1282724A1 yards of the impact for 5 sec.

abilities.name: Umbral Lash
abilities.text: Nysarra leaps to her primary target and unleashes consecutive slashes on them, inflicting 15 Shadow damage with every strike and causing Void Gash on the final one.

children.name: Void Gash
children.text: Gashes the player, knocking them back and increasing all damage taken by 50% for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Eclipsing Step
abilities.text: Nysarra slips into the shadows and strikes at random players, inflicting 12 Shadow damage and additional 4 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec to all players within $1252875a2 yards.

bosses.name: Lothraxion
bosses.lore: Blinded by betrayal, Lothraxion storms the Nexus-Point alone. With its defenses shattered, he prepares to breach the Nexus Core, risking a chain eruption that could annihilate Silvermoon and ripple across Azeroth itself.

Damage Dealers: [Brilliant Dispersion] inflicts damage to all nearby players.
Fractured Images unleash [Mirrored Rend] when standing too close.
Lothraxion hides among his distorted images during [Divine Guile] until he is interrupted.
Healers: [Brilliant Dispersion] targets several players and inflicts damage to all nearby players when reaching its targeted destination.
Fractured Images unleash [Mirrored Rend] when standing too close.
Lothraxian hides among his distorted images during [Divine Guile] until he is interrupted.
Tanks: [Searing Rend] inflicts heavy Physical damage and leaves behind [Radiant Scars].
Fractured Images unleash [Mirrored Rend] when standing too close.
Lothraxian hides among his distorted images during [Divine Guile] until he is interrupted.

abilities.name: Divine Guile
abilities.text: Upon reaching 100 energy, Lothraxion disguises himself amongst his Fractured Images as they all channel light energy into the core, inflicting 7 Holy damage every 2 sec until Lothraxion is interrupted.

children.name: Core Exposure
children.text: Inflicts 15 Holy damage to all players and increases Holy damage taken by 20% for 60 sec.

abilities.name: Brilliant Dispersion
abilities.text: Lothraxion unleashes radiant swarms toward several players, blasting players within $1255503A1 yards of the impact for 12 Holy damage and searing an additional 4 Holy damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Fractured Images scatter, erupting with Mirrored Rend to enemies within $1282791A1 yards of their creation.

children.name: Mirrored Rend
children.text: Coming in contact with a Fractured Image rends the target, knocking them away and inflicting 10 Holy damage with an additional 2 Holy damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks and leaves behind Radiant Scars.

children.name: Radiant Scar
children.text: A jagged brand of divine energy inflicts 10 Holy damage every 1 sec to players within the area.

children.name: Flicker
children.text: Fractured Images periodically flicker to new locations, inflicting 20 Holy damage and knocking away players in its path.

abilities.name: Searing Rend
abilities.text: Lothraxion lashes out with a precise, double-slash aimed at his current target, with each strike inflicting 25 Physical damage and an additional 4 Holy damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Carves Radiant Scars into the ground.

children.name: Radiant Scar
children.text: A jagged brand of divine energy inflicts 10 Holy damage every 1 sec to players within the area.

dungeons.name: Pit of Saron
dungeons.lore: Agents of the Lich King have captured Alliance forces and put them to work in this frozen quarry. To disrupt this critical source of saronite used for the Scourge's war effort, Lady Jaina Proudmoore and her allies aim to free these captives and put down the leader of this operation, Scourgelord Tyrannus.

bosses.name: Forgemaster Garfrost
bosses.lore: Forgemaster Garfrost has forged saronite into some of the most deadly weapons of the Scourge. He fills the air with a sinster chill, and he loves nothing more than squashing foes with the ore he carries on his back.

Damage Dealers: Garfrost [Throws Saronite] at targeted players.
Saronite ore offers protection from [Glacial Overload].

abilities.name: Glacial Overload
abilities.text: Garfrost's overloaded forge pulses cold for 3.5 sec, increasing all player's Frost damage taken by 75% every 0.5 sec for 14 sec. This effect stacks. Saronite ore protects players from this effect.

abilities.name: Throw Saronite
abilities.text: Garfrost throws saronite ore at players, inflicting 15 Physical damage to players within $1261295A1 yards of impact. The ore $?diff8|diff23[becomes Saronite Sludge and ][]explodes into Ore Chunks when destroyed.

children.name: Saronite Sludge
children.text: The smashed saronite oozes a harmful substance, inflicting 10 Shadow damage to players within it.

children.name: Ore Chunks
children.text: Chunks of saronite ore rain down, inflicting 30 Physical damage to players within $A1 yards of each impact.

abilities.name: Cryostomp
abilities.text: The Forgemaster's stomp causes an icy reverberation, inflicting 12 Physical damage to all players and sending out Cryoshards. This reverberation also destroys all saronite ore.

children.name: Cryoshards
children.text: Shards of ice slam into players, increasing their Frost damage taken by 50% and slowing them by -15% for 12 sec.

abilities.name: Orebreaker
abilities.text: Garfrost unleashes a devastating mace slam on players within $A1 yards of his primary target, inflicting 70 Physical damage and stunning them for 8 sec. If the slam strikes saronite ore, it no longer stuns, instead destroying the ore.

abilities.name: Siphoning Chill
abilities.text: The Forgemaster's frozen core siphons heat from players, inflicting 4 Frost damage to all players every 2 sec.

bosses.name: Ick and Krick
bosses.lore: The diminutive necromancer Krick oversees the contruction of horrific constructs within the Pit of Saron. Krick wears his foes down with dark magic and then commands the ghastly Ick to rip them into pieces.

Damage Dealers: [Shades of Krick] explode for significant damage if not defeated quickly.
[Shadowbind] and [Death Bolt] inflict significant harm unless stopped.
Krick's [Get 'Em, Ick!] compels Ick to fixate a player, ignoring others at all costs.

abilities.name: Necrolink
abilities.text: Krick connects his life force with Ick to enhance his control, causing both to share all damage taken.

children.name: Get 'Em, Ick!
children.text: Krick teleports atop Ick, compelling Ick to enter a Lumbering Fixation.

children.name: Lumbering Fixation
children.text: Ick fixates on a player for 5 sec, increasing his attack speed by 100% and ignoring other players at all costs. While fixating, he $?diff8|diff23[splatters Blight and ][]launches Plague Globs. Ick periodically changes which player he fixates upon.

children.name: Blight
children.text: Ick's blight pools inflict 15 Nature damage every 1 sec.

children.name: Plague Globs
children.text: Globules of necrotic filth impact the ground, inflicting 25 Nature damage to players within $A1 yards and forming Blight.

children.name: Blight
children.text: Ick's blight pools inflict 15 Nature damage every 1 sec.

children.name: Shade Shift
children.text: Krick releases a burst of dark energy and teleports to a ritual circle. This burst inflicts 8 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 2 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 12 sec. This ritual summons Shades of Krick nearby.

children.name: Shadowbind
children.text: Krick's shade channels dark magic into a player, inflicting 5 Shadow damage every 1 sec and slowing their movement speed by -35%.

children.name: Shade Bomb
children.text: Krick's shade explodes after 60 sec, destroying itself. This inflicts 50 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 10 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 10 sec. This effect stacks.

children.name: Death Bolt
children.text: Krick fires a massive shadow bolt at a player that inflicts 36 Shadow damage.

children.name: Shadow Lance
children.text: While riding atop Ick, Krick throws dark energy at a player that inflicts 6 Shadow damage.

children.name: Plague Expulsion
children.text: Ick disgorges a wave of necrotic filth, inflicting 12 Nature damage to all players and launching Plague Globs towards them.

children.name: Plague Globs
children.text: Globules of necrotic filth impact the ground, inflicting 25 Nature damage to players within $A1 yards and forming Blight.

children.name: Blight
children.text: Ick's blight pools inflict 15 Nature damage every 1 sec.

children.name: Blight Smash
children.text: Ick smashes his target, inflicting 55 Physical damage and forming Blight.

children.name: Blight
children.text: Ick's blight pools inflict 15 Nature damage every 1 sec.

bosses.name: Scourgelord Tyrannus
bosses.lore: The death knight Tyrannus was promoted to Scourgelord after slaying the giant Garfrost. His power and ruthlessness alongside his frost wyrm, Rimefang, make him the perfect guardian for the Pit of Saron and the entrance to the Halls of Reflection.

Damage Dealers: Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons a swarm of minions.
Rimefang's [Rime Blast] freezes any [Bone Piles] or [Infused Bone Piles] it impacts.
Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Bone Infusion] empowers some [Bone Piles].

children.name: Bone Infusion
children.text: $?diff23|diff8[Scourgelord Tyrannus stomps necrotic energy into the ground, turning some Bone Piles into Infused Bone Piles. The stomp inflicts 8 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 3 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.][Scourgelord Tyrannus stomps necrotic energy into the ground, inflicting 8 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 3 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.]

children.name: Bone Infusion
children.text: $?diff23|diff8[Scourgelord Tyrannus stomps necrotic energy into the ground, turning some Bone Piles into Infused Bone Piles. The stomp inflicts 8 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 3 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.][Scourgelord Tyrannus stomps necrotic energy into the ground, inflicting 8 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 3 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.]

children.name: Bone Piles
children.text: Unfrozen bone piles produce Rotlings when Scourgelord Tyrannus summons an Army of the Dead.

children.name: Rotting Strikes
children.text: The Rotling rots its primary target with each melee strike, reducing their maximum health by $<reduction>% for 3 sec. This effect stacks.

children.name: Infused Bone Piles
children.text: Unfrozen infused bone piles produce Scourge Plaguespreaders when Scourgelord Tyrannus summons an Army of the Dead.

children.name: Festering Pulse
children.text: The Scourge Plaguespreader's decaying presence inflicts 6 Nature damage to all players every 2 sec.

children.name: Plague Bolt
children.text: The Scourge Plaguespreader hurls putrid magic at a player that inflicts 12 Nature damage.

children.name: Army of the Dead
children.text: Scourgelord Tyrannus raises Rotlings from Bone Piles$?diff8|diff23[ and Scourge Plaguespreaders from Infused Bone Piles.][.]

children.name: Bone Piles
children.text: Unfrozen bone piles produce Rotlings when Scourgelord Tyrannus summons an Army of the Dead.

children.name: Rotting Strikes
children.text: The Rotling rots its primary target with each melee strike, reducing their maximum health by $<reduction>% for 3 sec. This effect stacks.

children.name: Army of the Dead
children.text: Scourgelord Tyrannus raises Rotlings from Bone Piles$?diff8|diff23[ and Scourge Plaguespreaders from Infused Bone Piles.][.]

children.name: Death's Grasp
children.text: Hands of the dead emerge at the location of players, inflicting 30 Shadow damage to players within $1263766A1 yards and slowing them by -40% for 3 sec.

children.name: Scourgelord's Brand
children.text: Tyrannus knocks away his primary target with a powerful slash, branding them. This brand increases Shadow damage taken by 200% for 6 sec. Afterward, Tyrannus casts Scourgelord's Reckoning.

children.name: Scourgelord's Reckoning
children.text: Tyrannus leaps at his primary target's location, delivering a heaving necrotic strike. This maneuver impacts players within $1263701A1 yards of the landing zone, inflicting 10 Physical damage and 30 Shadow damage.

children.name: Rime Blast
children.text: Rimefang blasts a player with ice, inflicting 12 Frost damage to players within $1262750A1 yards and applying Frostbite. Any Bone Piles$?diff8|diff23[ or Infused Bone Piles][] within the radius become frozen, preventing them from producing undead minions.

children.name: Frostbite
children.text: Rimefang chills his victim to the bone, inflicting 3 Frost damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.

children.name: Ice Barrage
children.text: Rimefang spits icy chunks towards players for 4.5 sec, inflicting 30 Frost damage to players within $1276973A1 yards of each impact.

children.name: Frost Spit
children.text: Rimefang spits frost at a player that inflicts 6 Frost damage.

dungeons.name: Seat of the Triumvirate
dungeons.lore:
Argus was governed from the gleaming halls of the Seat of the Triumvirate--until the eredar struck their unholy bargain with Sargeras. Enraged by Velen's defiant exodus, Kil'jaeden decreed that the Seat should be abandoned as a symbol of an irrelevant past... for the Legion had become their future.

Its once-gleaming halls now fallen into shadow, the Seat radiates a dark power that has drawn those seeking to harness the might of the Void and unleash it upon their enemies.

bosses.name: Zuraal the Ascended
bosses.lore: Zuraal represents the Shadowguard's first success at creating a void-infused Broken whose mind has not fallen into madness. A renowned brawler in his past life, Zuraal uses his newfound dark strength to empower his attacks and decimate his foes.

Damage Dealers: [Oozing Slam] causes [Coalesced Void] to spawn, which erupts in a [Dark Expulsion] when they reach Zuraal.
[Decimate] leaves behind [Void Sludge] in its impact area.
Healers: [Oozing Slam] causes [Coalesced Void] to spawn, which erupts in a [Dark Expulsion] when they reach Zuraal.
[Decimate] leaves behind [Void Sludge] in its impact area.
Tanks: [Void Slash] inflicts heavy Physical and Shadow damage.
[Oozing Slam] causes [Coalesced Void] to spawn, which erupts in a [Dark Expulsion] when they reach Zuraal.

abilities.name: Crashing Void
abilities.text: Upon reaching 100 energy, Zuraal begins to gather void energy around himself, pulling all players and Coalesced Void in. Zuraal unleashes the gathered void energy after 5 sec, inflicting 20 Shadow damage to all players and knocking them back.

abilities.name: Oozing Slam
abilities.text: Zuraal slams the ground with void energy, inflicting 12 Shadow damage to all players and inflicting additional 4 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. The slam also spawns Coalesced Void in nearby locations.

children.name: Dark Expulsion
children.text: Explodes in a shower of void energy, inflicting 22 Shadow to all enemies and additional 6 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Oozing Slam
abilities.text: Zuraal slams the ground with void energy, inflicting 12 Shadow damage to all players and inflicting additional 4 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. The slam also spawns Coalesced Void in nearby locations.

children.name: Umbral Ejection
children.text: When the Coalesced Void is killed, it leaves behind a pool of Void Sludge at its location.

children.name: Void Sludge
children.text: A pool of volatile void that inflicts 10 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

children.name: Dark Expulsion
children.text: Explodes in a shower of void energy, inflicting 22 Shadow to all enemies and additional 6 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Decimate
abilities.text: Zuraal infuses his fist with void energy and lashes out, inflicting 16 Shadow damage to their target and creating a pool of Void Sludge at their location.

children.name: Void Sludge
children.text: A pool of volatile void that inflicts 10 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

abilities.name: Null Palm
abilities.text: Zuraal releases a cresting wave of chaotic magic, inflicting 40 Shadow damage to all players in front of himself.

abilities.name: Void Slash
abilities.text: Zuraal unleashes three powerful swipes at his target, inflicting 30 Physical damage twice with another final strike inflicting 25 Shadow damage.

bosses.name: Saprish
bosses.lore: The ever-tactical Saprish deploys the forces of the Shadowguard with calculated precision. Though a skilled commander and strategist, Saprish relishes taking a direct hand in battle. He turns his foes' weaknesses against them, leaving his vulnerable adversaries at the mercy of his voracious pets.

Damage Dealers: Saprish's [Phase Dash] causes an [Umbral Nova] when dashing through a [Void Bomb].
[Overload] causes all the [Void Bombs] to explode, afflicting all players with [Seeping Void].
Healers: Saprish's [Phase Dash] causes an [Umbral Nova] when dashing through a [Void Bomb].
[Overload] causes all the [Void Bombs] to explode, afflicting all players with [Seeping Void].
Tanks: [Rending Void] inflicts Shadow damage on all melee strikes.
[Overload] causes all the [Void Bombs] to explode, afflicting all players with [Seeping Void].

children.name: Void Bomb
children.text: Saprish throws void bombs at nearby player locations. Upon contact with a player, the bomb explodes and inflicts 12 Shadow damage to players within $a1 yards and additional 3 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 15 sec.

children.name: Phase Dash
children.text: Saprish creates void shades that dash towards each player, inflicting 5 Shadow damage to all players within $a1 yards of impact. This effect detonates all Void Bomb hit, triggering Umbral Nova.

children.name: Umbral Nova
children.text: The Void Bomb releases a wave of void energy, inflicting 1 Shadow damage to all players.

children.name: Overload
children.text: Saprish releases a massive blast, inflicting 10 Shadow damage to all players and 7 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 8 sec. This blast ignites all Void Bombs, inflicting 5 Shadow damage to all players and applying Seeping Void.

children.name: Seeping Void
children.text: Void seeps into target player, increasing their Shadow damage taken by 20% for 60 sec. This effect stacks.

children.name: Rending Void
children.text: Saprish's melee attacks inflict an additional 8 Shadow damage.

children.name: Shadow Pounce
children.text: Darkfang pounces on a player, inflicting 6 Physical damage and additional 5 Physical damage every 1 sec for 5 sec.

children.name: Swoop
children.text: Shadewing swoops down on a random player, inflicting 12 Physical damage. After reaching their destination, Shadewing releases a Dread Screech.

children.name: Dread Screech
children.text: Shadewing releases a piercing screech, inflicting 20 Shadow damage and disorienting all players for 4 sec.

bosses.name: Viceroy Nezhar
bosses.lore:
Like others of his ilk, Viceroy Nezhar is obsessed with harnessing the power of the Void to serve his own ambitions. Drawn to the Seat of the Triumvirate by the immense darkness emanating from deep within, Nezhar will stop at nothing to claim it for his own.

Given the viceroy's experiments at infusing vessels with the power of shadow, the implications of what he might accomplish on Argus are dire indeed.

Damage Dealers: [Void Storm] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to players caught within it.
Umbral Tentacles channel [Mind Flay] on a random player.
Healers: [Void Storm] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to players caught within it.
Umbral Tentacles channel [Mind Flay] on a random player.

abilities.text: At 100 energy, Nezhar teleports to the center of the room, knocking all players back$?diff1|diff2[.]$?diff8[ while continuously pushing them with Repulsing Force.] Void energy begins to collapse towards Nezhar, forming a Void Storm after 9 sec.

children.name: Void Storm
children.text: Raging storm that inflicts 9 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 10 sec. Additionally, players inside the storm are suffer an additional 18 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

children.name: Unstable Entrance
children.text: Void tentacle tears into reality, inflicting 2 Shadow damage to all players.

children.name: Mind Flay
children.text: The Umbral Tentacle assaults a player's mind, inflicting 7 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Gates of the Abyss
abilities.text: Viceroy Nezhar summons a gate to the void that unleashes Umbral Waves.

abilities.name: Mind Blast

bosses.name: L'ura
bosses.lore:
When Velen and his followers fled Argus aboard the Genedar, the naaru L'ura stayed behind to buy the draenei time to escape. Kil'jaeden, enraged by this betrayal, ordered the wounded naaru sealed away in the Seat of the Triumvirate.

Over the long millennia that passed, L'ura fell from Light to Void. Her elegant song of courage and hope became a shadowy dirge of despair, luring those seeking to lay claim to her power.

Damage Dealers: [Discordant Beam] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to each targeted player and silences any [Notes of Despair] it hits.
Alleria's [Siphon Void] causes L'ura to take massively increased damage.
Healers: [Dirge of Despair] continues to damage all players until all [Notes of Despair] are silenced.
[Discordant Beam] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to each targeted player and silences any [Notes of Despair] it hits.

children.name: Dirge of Despair

children.name: Siphon Void

dungeons.name: Skyreach
dungeons.lore: Atop the crowning pinnacle of the Spires of Arak, amidst the clouds, Skyreach stands as the seat of power of the Adherents of Rukhmar. The arakkoa have gathered and harnessed the Apexis technology of their forebears, and now they are ready to unleash the focused power of the sun upon their enemies.

bosses.name: Ranjit
bosses.lore: Ranjit has spent a lifetime honing his skill with the bladed chakram, and found that as his mastery of the traditional arakkoa weapon grew, he could shape the wind itself and wield it against his enemies. He now guards access to the inner sanctum of Skyreach, willing to die to protect the seat of arakkoa power atop the Spires.

Damage Dealers: Ranjit hurls chakrams in various patterns to create damaging zones that move or rotate.
[Gale Surge] inflicts moderate damage to the targeted player and knocks them back.
Healers: Ranjit hurls chakrams in various patterns to create damaging zones that move or rotate.
Ranjit's [Fan of Blades] inflicts moderate damage to all players.
[Gale Surge] inflicts moderate damage to the targeted player and knocks them back.
Tanks: Ranjit hurls chakrams in various patterns to create damaging zones that move or rotate.

abilities.name: Chakram Vortex
abilities.text: Ranjit throws a powerful wind chakram to the center of the platform, inflicting 25 Nature damage to players within $1281396a2 yards of the impact area. The chakram continues to spin, inflicting 15 Nature damage to players it hits and knocking them back. The chakram forms raging wind vortexes that trail around the platform, inflicting 15 Nature damage to any enemy hit and knocking them in the air.

abilities.name: Gale Surge

abilities.name: Wind Chakram

bosses.name: Araknath
bosses.lore: The high arakkoa of Skyreach closely observed the civilization of the draenei, taking a keen interest in the towering Vigilants that guard their cities and temples. The arakkoa set out to create their own superior version, powered by solar energy - an unwaveringly obedient engine of destruction.

Damage Dealers: Stand in the path of the solar rays focused on Araknath to prevent [Energize], but doing so will inflict damage.
Healers: Stand in the path of the solar rays focused on Araknath to prevent [Energize], but doing so will inflict damage.
Araknath's [Supernova] damages all players.
Tanks: Avoid Araknath's [Fiery Smash] ability, which strikes with either the construct's left or right arm.

abilities.text: Lesser constructs surrounding the arena focus light rays at Araknath, healing it for 1% every 0.5 sec$?diff1|diff2[.][ and granting it Solar Infusion every 0.5 sec.] Players blocking light rays suffer 4 Fire damage every 1 sec.

children.name: Heat Exhaustion
children.text: The lesser constructs exhaust heat in front of them after focusing energy into Araknath, inflicting 20 Fire damage to players in the impact area.

abilities.name: Energize

abilities.text: Araknath is in a defensive stance, rooting itself and emitting blistering heat, inflicting 25 Fire damage every 1 sec to players standing within 5 yards.

bosses.name: Rukhran
bosses.lore: This majestic bird, rumored to be the progeny of the arakkoa sun-god Rukhmar, soars through the skies above the Spires of Arak. Rukhran has an affinity for solar energy, and can absorb the sun's power and unleash it to incinerate any prey.

Damage Dealers: Dawnwings will fixate on a player until they are defeated.
[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.
[Smoldering Egg] caught in the blast of [Blaze of Glory] will reawaken as a Dawnwing.
Healers: Dawnwings will fixate on a player until they are defeated.
[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.
Dawnwings inflict moderate damage to the group with [Burning Pursuit] while active.

bosses.name: High Sage Viryx
bosses.lore: High Sage Viryx has dedicated her rule wholly to harnessing Apexis artifacts in service of Rukhmar's will. At last, thanks to the completion of the massive crystal superweapon that focuses the sun's energy to destroy their enemies, it is time for the arakkoa to claim their rightful place as rulers of Draenor.

Damage Dealers: [Lens Flare] focuses on a random player and burns any player in its path while leaving behind [Blazing Ground].
[Cast Down] calls a Solar Zealot that picks up a random player and attempts to drop them over the edge of Skyreach.

dungeons.name: Windrunner Spire
dungeons.lore: Once the hallowed home of the Windunner family, Windrunner Spire now mirrors the scarred relationship between Alleria, Sylvanas, and Vereesa. Animosity during a reunion at the home drove suffering and grief into a haunted manifestation that binds the spirits there, unable to find peace.

bosses.name: Emberdawn
bosses.lore: Emberdawn settled in the gardens of Windrunner Spire after seeking a place to raise her young. Highly territorial, she guards her nest with a searing ferocity.

Damage Dealers: [Flaming Updraft] leaves behind a [Ignited Embers] upon expiration.
[Burning Gale] pushes players and causes [Ignited Embers] to create [Flaming Twisters].

abilities.name: Burning Gale
abilities.text: Emberdawn conjures a flaming windstorm that inflicts 4 Fire damage every 1 sec to all players and pushes them for 16 sec.

Upon expiration, the fire forms into a flaming patch that inflicts 15 Fire damage every 1.5 sec to players within it. The patch's central updraft inflicts 25 Fire damage to players who touch it, knocking them away.

abilities.name: Searing Beak
abilities.text: Emberdawn pecks her current target, inflicting 55 Physical damage and an additional 10 Fire damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.

bosses.name: Derelict Duo
bosses.lore: The banshee Kalis and her loyal abomination Latch lead a group of fanatical followers of Sylvanas Windrunner. They've come to the Spire in search of relics with any resonant essence of the Dark Lady, willing to do anything to obtain them.

Damage Dealers: Latch's [Heaving Yank] interrupts and pulls in the first target it hits.
Kalis's [Curse of Darkness] causes Dark Entities to fixate upon players.

abilities.name: Broken Bond
abilities.text: When either Kalis or Latch falls in battle, the other becomes incensed, increasing their damage done by 50% every 5 sec.

children.name: Debilitating Shriek
children.text: Kalis continually releases piercing shrieks, inflicting 5 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec and increasing their damage taken from Debilitating Shriek by 30% for 3 sec. This effect stacks. Latch's Heaving Yank interrupts this ability.

children.name: Curse of Darkness

children.name: Shadowy

children.name: Shadow Bolt

children.name: Heaving Yank

children.name: Heaving Chop

children.name: Splattering Spew
children.text: Latch spews bile onto players, inflicting 12 Nature damage to players within $472758A1 yards of each impact and applying Splattered. Gunk Splatter forms at the impact locations.

bosses.name: Commander Kroluk
bosses.lore: Commander Kroluk once fought in the Second War, a conflict that ended the life of Alleria Windrunner's brother, Lirath. In her grief, Alleria slaughtered any Old Horde she could find. The vengeful spirits of those she defeated now haunt the Spire.

Damage Dealers: [Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
[Bladestorm] inflicts damage to all players within Commander Kroluk's path.
[Intimidating Shout] fears players who stand alone.

children.name: Bladestorm

children.name: Shield Wall
children.text: Commander Kroluk fortifies himself, reducing his damage taken by 99%.

abilities.name: Reckless Leap

children.text: Falling debris rains from the ceiling, inflicting 20 Nature damage to players within $A1 yards of each impact location.

abilities.name: Intimidating Shout
abilities.text: Commander Kroluk bellows an intimidating shout, causing players who stand alone to run in fear and suffer 10 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 6 sec.

bosses.name: The Restless Heart
bosses.lore: Born from the grief and wrath of the Windrunner family, the vengeful spirit of a once-proud Ranger-General haunts the halls of its abandoned ancestral home. Only by facing a worthy foe can it be laid to rest and finally know peace.

Damage Dealers: [Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
[Bullseye Windblast] creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].
[Bolt Gale] launches a continuous volley of arrows towards a player.

children.name: Turbulent Arrows

children.name: Gust Shot

After 6 sec, the arrows unleash a wind gust, inflicting 9 Nature damage to players within $1253978A1 yards and an additional 3 Nature damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.$?diff8|diff23[ The wind gust destroys any Storming Soulfont hit.][]
